title: T1#19 — internal/config/config.go + godotenv dev
description:
# T1#19 — `internal/config/config.go` + godotenv dev

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q54 + T1 Amendment #19.

## Konteks

Lightweight struct loader, fail-fast validation, godotenv dev-only. Field set: `ListenAddr`, `MetaDBPath`, `EncryptionKeyPath`, `LogLevel`, `AppEnv`, `MetricsEnabled`, `AllowRemote`.

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "godotenv" → `query-docs` "godotenv Load conditional in Go".
   - Skip kalau jelas: `godotenv.Load()` baca `.env` ke `os.Setenv`.
2. Install: `go get github.com/joho/godotenv`.
3. File `internal/config/config.go` (≤80 baris):
   - Struct `Config { ListenAddr, MetaDBPath, EncryptionKeyPath, LogLevel, AppEnv string; MetricsEnabled, AllowRemote bool }`.
   - Func `Load() (*Config, error)`:
     - Step 1: Cek `os.Getenv("APP_ENV")`. Jika `"dev"` atau empty → call `godotenv.Load()` (silent error OK kalau file tidak ada).
     - Step 2: Build Config:
       - `ListenAddr` = env `LISTEN_ADDR` atau default `"127.0.0.1:8080"`.
       - `MetaDBPath` = env `META_DB_PATH` atau default `"./magic.db"`.
       - `EncryptionKeyPath` = env `ENCRYPTION_KEY_PATH` (REQUIRED, return error kalau kosong).
       - `LogLevel` = env `LOG_LEVEL` atau default `"info"`. Validate ∈ {`debug`, `info`, `warn`, `error`}.
       - `AppEnv` = env `APP_ENV` atau default `"prod"`. Validate ∈ {`dev`, `prod`}.
       - `MetricsEnabled` = env `METRICS_ENABLED == "true"`.
       - `AllowRemote` = env `MAGIC_ALLOW_REMOTE == "true"`.
     - Step 3: Validate (lihat T1#22 untuk ListenAddr loopback check).
     - Return `*Config, error`.
4. File `internal/config/config_test.go`:
   - Cover: missing required → error, default values applied, env override applied, AppEnv invalid → error.
5. File `.env.example` di root (template):
   - Comment-prefixed contoh untuk setiap field.
   - `# APP_ENV=dev`, `# LISTEN_ADDR=127.0.0.1:8080`, dst.
6. Tambah `.env` ke `.gitignore` (kalau belum).
7. Wire `Load()` di `cmd/magicsync/main.go` — fail-fast: kalau error, `log.Fatal`.
8. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- `go test ./internal/config/...` pass.
- `magicsync` startup fail jika `ENCRYPTION_KEY_PATH` tidak set.
- `.env.example` ada, `.env` di gitignore.
- Dev mode load `.env`, prod mode tidak.

## Tooling

- context7: godotenv (skip jika jelas).

## Dependency

Blocks: T1#22 (ListenAddr validation logic share di sini).
acceptance_criteria: go test ./internal/config pass; magicsync startup fail jika ENCRYPTION_KEY_PATH unset; .env.example ada; .env gitignored; dev load .env, prod tidak.

title: T1#17 — lib/apiClient.ts + lib/services/*.ts per-entity layer
description:
# T1#17 — `lib/apiClient.ts` + `lib/services/*.ts` per-entity layer

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q52 + T1 Amendment #17.

## Konteks

Hooks consume typed service methods (`profileService.list()`), bukan raw URL. apiClient unwrap Q44 envelope, throw typed `ApiError`. Injeksi correlation ID.

## Langkah

### Bagian A — apiClient

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "swr" → `query-docs` "SWR custom fetcher with error class throwing".
   - Tidak butuh context7 untuk fetch native.
2. File `web/src/lib/apiClient.ts` (≤100 baris):
   - Export `ApiError` class extends `Error` dengan field `code: string`, `details: any`, `status: number`, `correlationId: string | null`.
   - Helper `generateCorrelationId(): string` — UUID v4 (pakai `crypto.randomUUID()` browser native).
   - Generic functions `apiGet<T>(path: string): Promise<T>`, `apiPost<T, B>(path, body): Promise<T>`, `apiPut`, `apiDelete`.
   - Logic per call:
     - Generate correlation ID, inject header `X-Correlation-ID`.
     - `fetch(path, {method, headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Correlation-ID': id}, body: body && JSON.stringify(body)})`.
     - Parse response JSON.
     - Jika `!response.ok`:
       - Parse envelope `{error: {code, message, details}}`.
       - Throw `new ApiError(code, message, details, status, response.headers.get('X-Correlation-ID'))`.
     - Jika `response.ok`:
       - Return parsed JSON body sebagai `T`.
3. File `web/src/lib/apiClient.types.ts` (≤30 baris): re-export ApiError + interfaces shared.

### Bagian B — Services

4. Buat satu file per entity, semua di `web/src/lib/services/`:
   - `profiles.ts` — `profileService = {list, get(id), create(input), update(id, input), delete(id, opts), updatePairings(id, pairings), markReady(id), downgrade(id), preflight(id)}`.
   - `connections.ts` — `connectionService = {list, get, create, update, delete(id, {cascade}), testPreSave(input), testPostSave(id)}`.
   - `sessions.ts` — `sessionService = {list, get, start(profileId), cancel(id), logs(id, {limit, cursor}), logsGroups(id), logsCsvUrl(id)}`.
   - `preflight.ts` — `preflightService = {run(profileId)}` (sama dengan `profileService.preflight` — pisah file kalau ekspansi lebih lanjut, kalau tidak gabungkan ke profiles).
   - `maint.ts` — `maintService = {stats, evict}`.
   - `system.ts` — `systemService = {info}` (Q59 `/api/system/info`).
5. Type per entity di `web/src/types/`:
   - `Connection.ts` — interface match DTO T1#4 (`has_password` bukan `password_ciphertext`).
   - `MappingProfile.ts` — status enum, column_pairings, rules.
   - `SyncSession.ts` — status enum 5 nilai (lihat CONTEXT.md).
   - `SyncLog.ts` — log row shape.
   - `Rule.ts` — 5 type whitelist.
   - `DriftReport.ts` — match T1#2 shape.
   - `SystemInfo.ts` — `{remote_exposed, version, app_env}`.
6. Setiap service method ≤30 baris. Pisah file kalau >100 baris.

### Bagian C — SWR integration

7. Update existing hooks atau buat baru di `web/src/hooks/`:
   - `useConnections`, `useConnection(id)`, `useProfile(id)`, `useProfiles`, `useSession(id)`, `useSessions`, `useSystemInfo`.
   - Pattern: `useSWR(key, () => entityService.method())`.
   - Mutations: `useMutationWrapper` kalau pattern repetitif, atau plain `mutate` call per hook.
8. Test Vitest (T1#16):
   - apiClient: mock `fetch`, assert envelope unwrap + ApiError throw.
   - 1 service per entity: mock apiClient internal, assert URL constructed + method.

### Bagian D — Dokumentasi

9. Update `web/WEB_RULES.md` section "State management":
   - Tambah subsection "API client architecture" — apiClient + services + hooks layering.
   - Update import order di "Pemisahan Interface, Tampilan, Logic": hooks → services → apiClient → types.

10. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- `apiClient.ts` throw `ApiError` saat status non-2xx.
- 6 service files eksis dengan typed methods.
- 1+ hook refactored ke pakai service (smoke: `useConnections` pakai `connectionService.list`).
- Vitest unit pass untuk apiClient + 1 service.
- WEB_RULES.md updated.

## Tooling

- context7: SWR fetcher pattern.

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#9 (BE envelope ready) + T1#4 (Connection shape final).
Blocks: T1#10, T1#13, T1#14, T1#20.
acceptance_criteria: apiClient throw ApiError saat non-2xx; 6 service files eksis typed; 1+ hook refactored ke service; Vitest pass apiClient + 1 service; WEB_RULES.md updated.

title: T1#9 — internal/api/errors.go + envelope refactor + correlation middleware
description:
# T1#9 — `internal/api/errors.go` + envelope refactor + correlation ID middleware

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q44 + T1 Amendment #9.

## Konteks

Backend saat ini pakai `http.Error(w, err.Error(), status)` di semua handler `internal/api/*.go`. Plain text error tanpa code/correlation. Keputusan: JSON envelope `{"error": {"code", "message", "details"}}` everywhere + correlation ID middleware.

## Langkah

### Bagian A — Helper

1. Buat file `internal/api/errors.go` (≤100 baris).
2. Ekspor:
   - Type `ErrorEnvelope struct { Error ErrorBody \`json:"error"\` }`.
   - Type `ErrorBody struct { Code, Message string; Details any \`json:"details,omitempty"\` }`.
   - Func `WriteError(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, code, message string, details any, status int)`:
     - Set header `Content-Type: application/json`.
     - Set header `X-Correlation-ID` dari `r.Context()` (lihat middleware bagian C).
     - Set status code.
     - Encode envelope ke body.
     - Log via `slog.Error` (atau equivalent) dengan field: `correlation_id`, `code`, `status`, `path`, `method`.
3. Definisikan konstanta code di file terpisah `internal/api/error_codes.go` (≤50 baris) — enum string:
   - `VALIDATION_FAILED`, `NOT_FOUND`, `CONFLICT`, `CONFLICT_RUNNING_SESSION`, `CONFLICT_REFERENCED`, `INTERNAL`, `BAD_REQUEST`, `UNAUTHORIZED` (reserved Q59), dst.

### Bagian B — Refactor handler

1. `graphify query "http.Error"` cari semua call site di `internal/api/`.
2. Setiap call: ganti `http.Error(w, msg, status)` jadi `WriteError(w, r, "<CODE>", msg, nil, status)`. Pilih code yang sesuai (404 → `NOT_FOUND`, 400 → `BAD_REQUEST`, dst.).
3. Untuk error dari `json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(...)` → code `BAD_REQUEST`.
4. Hindari leak internal error message — wrap `err.Error()` di message sanitize kalau perlu. Kalau internal error → message generic "Internal server error", `details` nil, status 500, log full error.

### Bagian C — Middleware correlation ID

1. Buat file `internal/api/middleware/correlation.go` (≤50 baris).
2. Middleware: cek header request `X-Correlation-ID`. Kalau ada → re-use. Kalau tidak → generate UUID v4. Inject ke `r.Context()` via context key + set response header.
3. Library UUID: pakai `github.com/google/uuid` (sudah di go.mod? Cek `go.mod` dulu via `graphify query`). Kalau belum, tambah dep. **context7**: jika perlu spec UUID Go → `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "google/uuid" + `query-docs` "Go UUID v4 generation". Kalau sudah jelas (single function `uuid.New().String()`), context7 boleh skip.
4. Wire middleware ke router di `cmd/magicsync/main.go` atau wherever router di-init.

### Bagian D — slog config

1. Pastikan `slog` JSON handler di prod, text di dev (berdasar `APP_ENV` dari T1#19).
2. Setiap request log entry: `correlation_id`, `method`, `path`, `status`, `duration_ms`.

## Acceptance

- Semua endpoint return JSON envelope saat error.
- Response header `X-Correlation-ID` ada di semua response.
- `http.Error` tidak ada lagi di `internal/api/*.go` (grep zero match kecuali komentar).
- Test middleware: request tanpa correlation ID → response punya generated ID; request dengan ID → response echo same ID.

## Tooling

- graphify untuk discover `http.Error` call sites.
- context7 untuk `google/uuid` jika perlu (skip kalau sudah familiar).

## Dependency

Blocks: T1#5, T1#6, T1#7, T1#22.
acceptance_criteria: Semua endpoint return JSON envelope saat error; X-Correlation-ID header ada di semua response; grep http.Error di internal/api zero match; middleware test pass.

title: FE Rebuild Q1-Q60 Implementation
description:
# Epic: FE Rebuild Q1-Q60 Implementation

Container untuk semua pekerjaan implementasi keputusan grilling Q1-Q60. Semua child issue (T1 Amendment #1-22) blok pada epic ini untuk traceability, BUKAN sebagai sequential dependency.

## Truth source

- `plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` — keputusan + amendment list (canonical).
- `AGENTS.md` — tooling protocol + session close protocol.
- `CONTEXT.md` — istilah domain.
- `web/WEB_RULES.md` — FE rules.
- `DESIGN.md` — token DS.
- `ARCHITECTURE.md` — data flow.

## Wajib dibaca SEBELUM klaim child bead apa pun

1. `plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` — minimal section Q yang di-reference issue + T1 Amendment yang sesuai.
2. `AGENTS.md` section `[TOOLING_MANDATE]` + `[SESSION_CLOSE]`.

## Aturan eksekusi untuk semua child bead

- **context7 wajib** untuk: Next.js 16, Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui, react-hook-form, zod, cmdk, next-themes, SWR, Vitest, Prometheus client_golang, godotenv. Jangan tebak API library.
- **graphify wajib**: `graphify query "..."` SEBELUM grep/read.
- **Code rules**: ≤100 baris/file (cap 120), 1 komponen/file, 1 struct/file (`models`), 1 resource/file (`api`).
- **Identifier English, prosa Indonesia** per `AGENTS.md` `[CODE_RULES]`.
- **No improvisasi**: kerjakan SCOPE issue saja. Refactor di luar scope = bead baru.
- **Session close**: `git pull --rebase` → `bd dolt push` → `git push` → update `plan/claim-order-ui.md`.

## Acceptance epic

Epic close saat semua 22 child issue (T1#1 - T1#22) close DAN:
- `make embed-check && make build && make test` pass.
- `plan/claim-order-ui.md` updated dengan checklist baru (Q-grilling track).
acceptance_criteria: Semua 22 child issue (T1#1 - T1#22) close DAN make embed-check && make build && make test pass DAN plan/claim-order-ui.md updated dengan checklist Q-grilling track.

title: T1#22 — Prometheus /metrics + slog + /api/system/info + remote-bind guard
description:
# T1#22 — Prometheus `/metrics` + slog correlation + `/api/system/info` + remote-bind guard

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q57 + Q59 + T1 Amendment #22.

## Konteks

Telemetry + auth-by-bind. Single bead karena ketiganya saling silang (config loader feed semua).

## Langkah

### Bagian A — Prometheus metrics

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "prometheus client_golang" → `query-docs` "prometheus client_golang counter histogram gauge with promhttp Handler".
2. Install: `go get github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus/promhttp`.
3. File `internal/observability/metrics.go` (≤100 baris):
   - Define collectors (global var atau struct):
     - `SyncStartedTotal` — `prometheus.NewCounter(...)`.
     - `SyncFailedTotal` — counter.
     - `SseClientsActive` — `prometheus.NewGauge(...)`.
     - `HttpRequestsTotal` — counter dengan label `method`, `path_pattern`, `status_class` (`2xx`, `4xx`, `5xx`).
     - `SyncDurationSeconds` — `prometheus.NewHistogram(...)` dengan buckets default.
     - `HttpRequestDurationSeconds` — histogram dengan label `method`, `path_pattern`.
   - Register ke `prometheus.DefaultRegisterer`.
4. File `internal/observability/handler.go` (≤30 baris):
   - Ekspor `Handler() http.Handler` = `promhttp.Handler()`.
5. Wire di router (`cmd/magicsync/main.go` atau api init):
   - Mount `/metrics` ONLY kalau `config.MetricsEnabled == true`.
   - Bind ke loopback only (sama Q59 — kalau `AllowRemote == false`, metrics endpoint juga loopback).
6. Wire HTTP middleware untuk request metrics (`HttpRequestsTotal` + `HttpRequestDurationSeconds`):
   - Bungkus router dengan middleware yang record start time, call next, record status + duration.
7. Wire sync metrics di `internal/sync/`:
   - `graphify query "sync session start"` lokasi.
   - Increment `SyncStartedTotal` saat start.
   - Increment `SyncFailedTotal` saat fail.
   - Observe `SyncDurationSeconds` saat selesai.
8. SSE gauge:
   - `graphify query "SSE client connect"` lokasi.
   - Increment `SseClientsActive` on connect, decrement on disconnect.

### Bagian B — slog correlation

9. (Mostly done di T1#9 middleware correlation.) Pastikan setiap request log entry punya field `correlation_id`. Format JSON kalau `AppEnv == "prod"`, text kalau `dev`.
10. File `internal/observability/logger.go` (≤30 baris):
    - `Init(cfg *config.Config)` — set default `slog.SetDefault(...)` dengan handler sesuai env.
11. Wire di `cmd/magicsync/main.go` — call `observability.Init(cfg)` after `config.Load()`.

### Bagian C — `/api/system/info` + remote-bind guard

12. File `internal/api/system.go` (≤50 baris):
    - Handler `Info(w, r)`:
      - Read `config.Config` (inject via constructor).
      - Detect `remote_exposed`:
        - Parse `cfg.ListenAddr` host.
        - `remote_exposed = host != "127.0.0.1" && host != "localhost" && host != "::1"`.
      - Response: `{"remote_exposed": bool, "version": "...", "app_env": "..."}`.
      - Pakai Q44 envelope helper untuk error path (tidak relevan untuk handler ini — selalu 200).
13. Register route `GET /api/system/info`.

### Bagian D — Remote-bind validation

14. Update `internal/config/config.go` `Load()`:
    - Setelah baca `ListenAddr` + `AllowRemote`:
      - Parse host dari ListenAddr.
      - Jika host bukan loopback DAN `AllowRemote == false` → return error "ListenAddr must be loopback unless MAGIC_ALLOW_REMOTE=true".
      - Jika `AllowRemote == true` DAN host bukan loopback → `slog.Warn` startup banner "REMOTE ACCESS ENABLED. API NOT authenticated. Bind to 127.0.0.1 for security."
15. Tambah test config: cover allow-remote-with-non-loopback (pass), no-allow-remote-with-non-loopback (fail), loopback (pass always).

### Bagian E — FE consume system info

16. T1#17 service `systemService.info()` sudah ada. Hook `useSystemInfo()`.
17. Komponen `web/src/components/RemoteExposedBanner.tsx` (≤30 baris):
    - Pakai `useSystemInfo()`.
    - Render persistent red banner kalau `remote_exposed == true`. Pesan: "Remote access enabled. API not authenticated. Bind to 127.0.0.1 for security."
    - Pakai shadcn `<Alert variant="destructive">` atau equivalent.
18. Mount banner di `app/layout.tsx` di atas main content.

### Bagian F — Update plan/api_endpoints.md

19. Tambah `GET /api/system/info` dan `GET /metrics`.

20. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- `curl /metrics` (saat enabled) return Prometheus exposition format.
- `curl /api/system/info` return JSON dengan 3 field.
- Startup dengan `LISTEN_ADDR=0.0.0.0:8080` tanpa `MAGIC_ALLOW_REMOTE=true` → fail fast.
- Startup dengan keduanya → warning log + FE banner muncul.
- Sync session start increment counter.
- SSE connect gauge naik, disconnect turun.
- All HTTP requests punya `correlation_id` di log.

## Tooling

- context7: prometheus client_golang.
- graphify: discover sync start + SSE connect points.

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#9 (middleware correlation), T1#17 (FE service), T1#19 (config loader).
acceptance_criteria: curl /metrics return Prometheus format saat enabled; /api/system/info return 3 field; startup 0.0.0.0 tanpa allow-remote fail fast; FE banner muncul saat remote_exposed; sync counters increment; SSE gauge naik turun; HTTP log correlation_id.

title: T1#20 — SWR optimistic mutations (safe ops)
description:
# T1#20 — SWR optimistic mutations untuk safe operations

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q55 + T1 Amendment #20.

## Konteks

Optimistic UI untuk: `useRenameProfile`, `useToggleRule`, `useUpdatePairings`. Server-confirmed untuk delete, markReady, startSync, applyRule.

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "swr" → `query-docs` "SWR mutate optimisticData rollbackOnError pattern".
2. Implementasi (lokasi: `web/src/hooks/`):
   - **`useRenameProfile.ts`**:
     - Input: `profileId`.
     - Return: `{rename: (newName: string) => Promise<void>}`.
     - Logic: panggil `mutate(profilesKey, (old) => updateProfileName(old, profileId, newName), {optimisticData: ..., rollbackOnError: true, revalidate: true})` + call `profileService.update(profileId, {name: newName})`.
     - On error: toast (Q45 background) "Update gagal, dibatalkan" via `sonner`.
   - **`useToggleRule.ts`**:
     - Input: `profileId`, `ruleId`.
     - Toggle `rule.enabled` boolean optimistically.
     - Service call: `profileService.updatePairings` atau dedicated `toggleRule` endpoint.
   - **`useUpdatePairings.ts`**:
     - Input: `profileId`.
     - Return: `{update: (pairings: ColumnPairing[]) => Promise<void>}`.
     - Optimistic merge pairings ke cached profile.
     - Service: `profileService.updatePairings`.
     - **PENTING**: T1#7 auto-downgrade — kalau response `downgraded_from` ada, fire toast info "Profile diturunkan ke draft".
3. **Tidak optimistic** (plain mutation + button spinner via T1#11):
   - `useDeleteConnection.ts` — confirm dialog dulu, lalu `connectionService.delete(id, {cascade})`.
   - `useMarkReady.ts` — modal preflight (Q29) dulu, lalu `profileService.markReady(id)`.
   - `useStartSync.ts` — `sessionService.start(profileId)`.
   - `useApplyRule.ts` — service call + revalidate.
4. Pattern shared: helper `web/src/hooks/_mutationHelpers.ts` (≤50 baris) — `withErrorToast(fn)` wrapper kalau pola repetitif.
5. Test Vitest (T1#16):
   - `useRenameProfile`: mock service, render hook via `renderHook`, call `rename`, assert SWR cache mutated, assert service called.
   - Error path: mock service throw, assert rollback + toast call.
6. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- 3 optimistic hooks bekerja: UI update instan, server confirm di background, rollback + toast on error.
- 4 server-confirmed hooks bekerja: button spinner saat pending, full reload state on success.
- Vitest unit test per hook minimal 2 case (success + error).

## Tooling

- context7: SWR optimistic.

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#17 (services).
acceptance_criteria: 3 optimistic hooks instan + rollback toast on error; 4 server-confirmed hooks button spinner + full reload; Vitest 2+ case per hook.

title: T1#18 — Makefile orchestration + embed-check
description:
# T1#18 — Makefile orchestration + `embed-check`

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q53 + T1 Amendment #18.

## Konteks

Build pipeline orchestrated via Makefile. `embed-check` mencegah ship stale FE bundle.

## Langkah

1. Verifikasi `make` tersedia (POSIX standard, tidak butuh install).
2. **context7 boleh skip** (Makefile = standard syntax, bukan lib).
3. File `Makefile` di root (≤80 baris):
   - Target `help` (default) — print list target.
   - Target `dev-web`: `cd web && bun dev`.
   - Target `dev-go`: pakai `air` kalau ada (`.air.toml` di repo?). Fallback: `go run ./cmd/magicsync`.
   - Target `dev`: chain `dev-web` + `dev-go` di background dengan `&` + `wait`. **Catatan**: kalau dual-terminal lebih simple, dokumentasikan di README dan target `dev` cukup hint "run dev-web + dev-go in separate terminals".
   - Target `build-web`: `cd web && bun run build` → produce `web/out/`.
   - Target `build-go`: `go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o magicsync ./cmd/magicsync`.
   - Target `build`: `build-web` → `build-go` (sequential).
   - Target `embed-check`: shell logic compare mtime:
     - Newest file di `web/src/**`: `find web/src -type f -printf '%T@\n' | sort -nr | head -1`.
     - Mtime `web/out/index.html`: `stat -c '%Y' web/out/index.html`.
     - Jika newest src > out → `echo "FE bundle stale. Run 'make build-web' first." && exit 1`.
   - Target `test`: `go test -race ./... && cd web && bun run test`.
   - Target `clean`: `rm -rf web/out web/.next magicsync`.
4. File `.air.toml` (optional, kalau Go hot-reload diinginkan):
   - **context7 skip** (config standard, dokumentasi minimal di internet).
   - Atau skip total — pakai `go run` polling manual.
5. Update `README.md` section "Development":
   - Document `make dev`, `make build`, `make test`, `make clean`.
   - Catat `embed-check` jalan otomatis di CI.
6. CI config (kalau ada `.github/workflows/*.yml` atau `.gitlab-ci.yml`):
   - Tambah step `make embed-check && make build && make test`.
   - Kalau belum ada CI: SKIP, dokumentasikan di README "CI: run `make embed-check && make build && make test`".
7. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- `make build` produce `magicsync` binary + `web/out/` static.
- `make embed-check` exit 1 jika `web/src/` lebih baru dari `web/out/index.html`.
- `make test` jalan keduanya BE + FE.
- README documented.

## Tooling

- context7: skip.

## Dependency

Tidak ada blocker. Bisa parallel.
acceptance_criteria: make build produce magicsync binary + web/out static; make embed-check exit 1 saat stale; make test jalan BE + FE; README documented.

# T1#12 — `next-themes` + dual CSS vars + DESIGN.md dark palette

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q47 + T1 Amendment #12.

## Konteks

Dual theme: light + dark, system default, manual toggle (sun/moon header). Tailwind v4 zero-config pakai `@variant dark` + dual CSS var sets di `@theme`. `DESIGN.md` saat ini hanya define light palette — wajib di-extend.

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "next-themes" → `query-docs` "next-themes Next.js 16 App Router setup with attribute class and system default".
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "tailwindcss" → `query-docs` "Tailwind CSS v4 @variant dark and @theme dual color variables".
2. **Install dep**: `cd web && bun add next-themes`.
3. **Provider**: edit `web/src/app/layout.tsx`:
   - Wrap children dengan `<ThemeProvider attribute="class" defaultTheme="system" enableSystem disableTransitionOnChange>`.
   - Import dari `next-themes`.
4. **CSS vars**: edit `web/src/app/globals.css`:
   - Section `@theme` (Tailwind v4) — define light tokens (sudah ada dari shadcn init).
   - Tambah section `.dark { --background: ...; --foreground: ...; ... }` (atau pakai `@variant` per Tailwind v4 docs).
   - Token wajib mirror semua light tokens: `background`, `foreground`, `card`, `card-foreground`, `popover`, `popover-foreground`, `primary`, `primary-foreground`, `secondary`, `secondary-foreground`, `muted`, `muted-foreground`, `accent`, `accent-foreground`, `destructive`, `destructive-foreground`, `border`, `input`, `ring`, `chart-1..5`, `sidebar-*`.
   - Nilai kontras WCAG AA per Q50 (text foreground vs background ≥4.5:1, UI elements ≥3:1).
5. **Toggle component**: `web/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx` (≤50 baris):
   - Pakai `useTheme()` dari `next-themes`.
   - Render `<Button variant="ghost" size="icon">` dengan icon lucide `Sun`/`Moon`. Animate transition.
   - On click: toggle antara `light`/`dark` (atau cycle light→dark→system).
6. **Header integration**: bead UI shell lain akan integrate `<ThemeToggle>` di header. Issue ini sediakan komponen + provider saja.
7. **DESIGN.md update**: tambah section "Dark mode palette" dengan tabel mirror semua token light + nilai hex dark. Catatan: kontras audit hasil simpan di file (mis. `--background #0a0a0a` + `--foreground #fafafa` = ratio 19.5:1).
8. **Hydration safety**: tambah `suppressHydrationWarning` di `<html>` tag di `layout.tsx` (next-themes requires).
9. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- Toggle theme di-click → seluruh app re-render dark/light tanpa flash.
- Refresh halaman → theme persisted (next-themes default localStorage).
- System theme = OS preference saat default.
- Semua shadcn primitive (button, card, dialog, dst.) tampil benar di kedua mode.
- Kontras audit: minimum 4.5:1 text, dicatat di DESIGN.md.

## Tooling

- context7: next-themes + Tailwind v4.

## Dependency

Tidak ada blocker langsung. Bisa parallel dengan bead lain.
acceptance_criteria: Toggle theme re-render tanpa flash; persisted; system theme default; semua shadcn primitive tampil benar light+dark; kontras audit 4.5:1 minimum.

description:
# T1#10 — FE error surface layering (`lib/errorSurface.ts` + hooks)

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q45 + T1 Amendment #10. Bergantung pada T1#17 (apiClient → ApiError).

## Konteks

FE error surface harus layered: field (inline), form (banner), page (empty-state retry), background (toast), blocking (modal). Centralized di satu tempat agar mapping `error.code → surface` konsisten.

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib** sebelum tulis kode:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "sonner" (toast lib pilihan). `query-docs` "Sonner toast React API showError pattern".
   - Sudah familiar React hooks → tidak butuh context7 untuk React itself.
2. File `web/src/lib/errorSurface.ts` (≤100 baris):
   - Ekspor type `SurfaceLayer = 'field' | 'form' | 'page' | 'background' | 'blocking'`.
   - Ekspor func `classifyError(err: ApiError): SurfaceLayer` — mapping default berdasar `err.code` + `err.status`:
     - `VALIDATION_FAILED` + `details.fields` ada → `field`.
     - `VALIDATION_FAILED` tanpa fields → `form`.
     - 5xx → `page` atau `background` (lihat context call).
     - `CONFLICT_RUNNING_SESSION` → `blocking`.
     - `NOT_FOUND` → `page`.
     - Default → `background`.
   - Ekspor func `surfaceError(err, opts: {layer?, formApi?, setBanner?})` — dispatch ke surface yang dipilih (atau auto-classify).
3. File `web/src/hooks/useFormError.ts` (≤50 baris):
   - Hook menerima `react-hook-form` form instance.
   - Method `apply(err: ApiError)`: jika `err.details.fields[]` → loop, call `form.setError(field, {message})`. Kalau tidak, set banner state.
   - Return `{banner: string | null, apply, clear}`.
4. File `web/src/hooks/usePageError.ts` (≤50 baris):
   - Hook return `{error: ApiError | null, set, clear, retry}`.
   - Wajib expose untuk `<PageError>` komponen (komponen UI di bead lain).
5. **Surface komponen UI dibuat di bead T1#11** (loading boundary) atau bead UI baru. Issue ini hanya logic.
6. Test (T1#16 Vitest): unit `classifyError` + `useFormError.apply` (mock ApiError shapes).
7. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- `classifyError(err)` correctly returns layer untuk 5 sample ApiError shapes.
- `useFormError.apply(err)` set field errors atau banner sesuai shape.
- Unit test cover 5+ case.

## Tooling

- context7: `sonner` API.
- graphify: tidak banyak (file baru).

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#17 (apiClient + ApiError class).

title: T1#7 — UpdatePairings auto-set status draft
description:
# T1#7 — UpdatePairings auto-set status `draft` saat mutate ready/active

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → T1 Amendment #7.

## Konteks

Profile state machine: `draft → ready → active`. Saat profile `ready` atau `active` lalu user mutate `column_pairings_json`/`rules_json`, profile harus DOWNGRADE ke `draft` (re-validate via MarkReady lagi). FE sudah punya konfirmasi modal sebelum POST. Backend wajib enforce.

## Langkah

1. `graphify query "UpdatePairings handler"` lokasi `internal/api/profiles.go`.
2. Verifikasi behavior existing:
   - Apakah sudah auto-set `draft`? Kalau ya, hanya tambah field warning di response.
   - Kalau belum, modifikasi.
3. Logic:
   - Step 1: Load profile current. Capture `prev_status`.
   - Step 2: Update `column_pairings_json` + `rules_json`.
   - Step 3: Jika `prev_status` ∈ {`ready`, `active`} → set status `draft` di DB.
   - Step 4: Return body `{"profile": {...}, "downgraded_from": "ready" | "active" | null}`. Jika `downgraded_from != null` → FE tampilkan toast info (Q45 background).
4. Atomic: ketiga update di satu transaction.
5. **Status `active` jangan auto-downgrade** kalau ada SyncSession running yang pakai profile ini — return 409 instead. Cek via `repo.SessionsRepo.ActiveByProfile(id)`. (Skenario: sync sedang jalan, jangan biarkan pairings berubah mid-sync.)
6. Test handler 4 skenario: draft→draft (no downgrade), ready→draft, active→draft (no running session), active+running session → 409.
7. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- PUT pairings di `ready` → status jadi `draft`, response `downgraded_from: "ready"`.
- PUT pairings di `active` (no running session) → status jadi `draft`, response `downgraded_from: "active"`.
- PUT pairings di `active` (with running session) → 409.
- PUT pairings di `draft` → no downgrade, `downgraded_from: null`.

## Tooling

- graphify.
- Tidak butuh context7.

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#9.
acceptance_criteria: PUT pairings di ready → draft + downgraded_from response; di active no running → draft; di active + running session → 409; di draft → no downgrade.

title: T1#5 — Connection Delete cascade + ref + running-session guard
description:
# T1#5 — Connection Delete cascade flag + reference + running-session guard

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → T1 Amendment #5.

## Konteks

`internal/api/connections.go` `Delete` (line 151-158) saat ini naive `repo.Delete(id)` tanpa cek referensi. Konsekuensi: bisa orphan-kan mapping profiles atau interrupt running sync.

Keputusan:
- Jika ada running session pakai connection → return 409 dengan list active sessions.
- Jika hanya profile reference (no running session) → require `?cascade=true`, hapus profiles + connection atomic.
- Tanpa `?cascade` dan ada referensi → return 409 dengan list referencing profiles.

## Langkah

1. `graphify query "sync_sessions table query"` lokasi repo session.
2. `graphify query "mapping_profiles table"` lokasi repo profiles.
3. Tambah repo helper:
   - `repo.SessionsRepo.ActiveByConnection(connID) ([]Session, error)` — return sessions dengan status `running`/`paused` (sesuai status enum 5-nilai).
   - `repo.ProfilesRepo.ByConnection(connID) ([]Profile, error)` — return profiles yang reference connection (source_id atau dest_id).
4. Modifikasi handler `Delete`:
   - Step 1: cek `ActiveByConnection`. Kalau non-empty → `WriteError(w, "CONFLICT_RUNNING_SESSION", "Cannot delete: active sync sessions exist", map[string]any{"active_sessions": [...]}, 409)`.
   - Step 2: cek `ByConnection`. Kalau non-empty AND `r.URL.Query().Get("cascade") != "true"` → `WriteError(w, "CONFLICT_REFERENCED", "Cannot delete: profiles reference this connection", map[string]any{"profiles": [...]}, 409)`.
   - Step 3: kalau `cascade=true` → repo transaction: delete profiles + delete connection atomic.
   - Step 4: kalau no references → delete langsung.
5. Repo transaction: pakai `db.BeginTx` / wrapper existing di `internal/repo/`.
6. Dependency: butuh T1#9 (`WriteError` helper) **selesai dulu**. Buat dependency link `bd link <this> blocks <T1#9>` (reverse: blocked-by).
7. Test handler 4 skenario.
8. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- DELETE conn dengan active session → 409 + active_sessions di details.
- DELETE conn dengan profile ref tanpa `?cascade` → 409 + profiles di details.
- DELETE conn dengan `?cascade=true` → 204 + profiles ikut terhapus.
- DELETE conn tanpa ref → 204.
- Atomic: failure mid-cascade → rollback.

## Tooling

- graphify.
- Tidak butuh context7.

## Dependency

Blocked by T1#9 (WriteError helper).
acceptance_criteria: DELETE conn active session → 409 + active_sessions; DELETE conn profile ref tanpa cascade → 409 + profiles; DELETE conn dengan cascade=true → 204 + profiles terhapus; tanpa ref → 204; atomic.

title: T1#4 — Connection GET omit PasswordCiphertext, return has_password
description:
# T1#4 — Connection GET omit `PasswordCiphertext`, return `has_password`

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → T1 Amendment #4.

## Konteks

Saat ini `internal/api/connections.go` `Get` (line 80-92) marshal `repo.Connection` langsung yang include `PasswordCiphertext`. Risiko leak ciphertext via API. Keputusan: shape API connection = `{id, name, host, port, user, has_password: bool, last_test_status, last_test_error}`.

## Langkah

1. `graphify query "repo Connection struct"` lokasi struct.
2. **Pilihan implementasi** (pilih yang lebih clean):
   - **A**: Tambah custom `MarshalJSON` di `repo.Connection` yang skip ciphertext dan compute `has_password = len(PasswordCiphertext) > 0`.
   - **B**: Buat DTO terpisah `api.ConnectionResponse` di `internal/api/` + helper `toResponse(*repo.Connection) ConnectionResponse`. Lebih eksplisit + memisahkan concern.
   - **Rekomendasi: B** (lebih sesuai aturan 1 struct/file + memisahkan transport shape dari persistence shape).
3. Refactor handler `List` + `Get` + `Create` + `Update` agar response pakai DTO ini.
4. Pastikan field `has_password` true saat `PasswordCiphertext != ""`.
5. Update FE service signature di T1#17 — typed `Connection` di FE mirror DTO ini.
6. Test handler — assert ciphertext tidak muncul di JSON output.
7. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- GET `/api/connections/{id}` JSON response **tidak punya** field `password_ciphertext`.
- Field `has_password: boolean` ada.
- Test handler verifikasi shape.
- LIST endpoint pun pakai DTO.

## Tooling

- graphify.
- Tidak butuh context7.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/connections/{id} response tidak punya field password_ciphertext; has_password boolean ada; test handler verifikasi shape; LIST pakai DTO.

# T1#3 — Connection Update skip password jika empty

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → T1 Amendment #3.

## Konteks

`internal/api/connections.go` line 122-149 `Update` saat ini **selalu** encrypt `req.Password` dan overwrite `PasswordCiphertext`. Konsekuensi: kalau FE tidak include password (user hanya edit nama/host), password lama hilang.

## Langkah

1. `graphify query "ConnectionsRepo Update"` untuk lokasi repo method di `internal/repo/`.
2. Tambah repo method `UpdateWithoutPassword(conn *Connection) error` yang UPDATE semua kolom kecuali `password_ciphertext`. Lokasi: file `internal/repo/connections.go` (atau split file baru jika existing >100 baris).
3. Modifikasi `internal/api/connections.go` `Update`:
   - Jika `req.Password == ""` → panggil `repo.UpdateWithoutPassword(conn)` tanpa set ciphertext.
   - Jika `req.Password != ""` → flow existing (encrypt + `repo.Update`).
4. Update test (`internal/repo/connections_test.go` kalau ada, atau buat baru) — cover both branches.
5. Update FE: bead T1#17 (apiClient/services) — service method `connectionService.update` accepts optional `password`. Tapi issue ini SCOPE backend saja.
6. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- PUT `/api/connections/{id}` dengan body tanpa `password` → password lama preserved di DB.
- PUT dengan body include `password` → encrypted + saved.
- Test unit kedua path pass.
- Aturan ≤100 baris/file dijaga.

## Tooling

- graphify: repo + handler discovery.
- Tidak butuh context7.
acceptance_criteria: PUT /api/connections/{id} tanpa password preserve password lama; dengan password encrypt + save; unit test kedua path pass; ≤100 baris/file.

   - `blocking_source`: array dengan shape sama.

JANGAN sentuh logika `preflight.Run()` core — issue ini hanya HTTP exposure.

description:
# T1#1 — Pindahkan SSE endpoint ke `/api/sse/{id}`

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → T1 Amendment #1.

## Konteks

Frontend dan backend saat ini mungkin pakai `/api/sessions/{id}/events`. Keputusan grilling: SSE wajib di `/api/sse/{id}` untuk konsistensi pemisahan kanal real-time vs REST.

## Langkah

1. `graphify query "SSE endpoint handler"` untuk lokasi handler SSE existing di `internal/sse/` dan registrasi di `internal/api/` (atau `cmd/magicsync/`).
2. Identifikasi tempat path SSE didefinisikan (router mux).
3. Pindahkan path ke `/api/sse/{id}`.
4. Hapus / redirect route lama jika masih dipakai test. **JANGAN** tinggalkan dual-path (cause future confusion).
5. Update `web/WEB_RULES.md` section "Domain ↔ Komponen mapping" baris `useSseSession` agar mencantumkan path `/api/sse/{id}`.
6. Update `plan/api_endpoints.md` agar mencantumkan `GET /api/sse/{id}`.
7. Test integration: pastikan `cmd/magicsync` start tanpa error route conflict.
8. Jalankan `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- Endpoint `GET /api/sse/{id}` melayani SSE stream session.
- Path lama 404 (bukan dual-serve).
- `plan/api_endpoints.md` + `web/WEB_RULES.md` selaras.
- `go test -race ./internal/sse/...` pass.

## Tooling

- graphify: lokasi router.
- Tidak butuh context7 (bukan lib API).

title: Distribution build pipeline (linux amd64+arm64, windows amd64)
description: V1 rilis untuk **linux/amd64 + linux/arm64 + windows/amd64**, **macOS skip** (Apple Developer Program prematur, Gatekeeper friction; lihat ADR-0021). Cross-compile manual via scripts/release.sh vX.Y.Z di mesin dev (loop GOOS/GOARCH ~15 baris, output ke dist/), upload ke GitHub Release pakai 'gh release create vX.Y.Z dist/* --notes-file CHANGELOG.md'. **Versioning SemVer longgar** mulai v0.1.0 (per milestone progress) sampai v1.0.0 (semua slice lulus + smoke 3-target); pre-1.0 breaking change schema SQLite / profile JSON boleh tanpa MAJOR bump (V1 belum janji stabilitas). Versi di-inject via -ldflags '-X main.version=$VERSION', di-expose lewat GET /api/version + UI Settings/About. **CHANGELOG.md** format Keep a Changelog Bahasa Indonesia audience user akhir (mis. 'Tambah dukungan Sync Session yang bisa dibatalkan', bukan istilah teknis ADR); gh release membaca section terbaru. Flow rilis manual: edit CHANGELOG.md → git tag vX.Y.Z → git push --tags → ./scripts/release.sh vX.Y.Z → gh release create. **Tidak ada GitHub Actions V1**. Binary unsigned: Linux nihil friction, Windows SmartScreen 'More info → Run anyway' didokumentasikan di README dengan 2 screenshot bahasa awam (tidak menyebut 'code signing' / 'EV cert'). Landing page badge platform + catatan ramah 'macOS akan didukung versi mendatang, sementara bisa via Docker/Lima'. -ldflags '-s -w' cukup; **tidak pakai UPX** (trigger AV false positive Windows Defender). Smoke test 3 target sebelum tag.

title: Retention via capacity + incremental vacuum + Settings/Health page
description: **V1 retention berbasis capacity, bukan waktu** (override CLAUDE.md/PRD legacy 30-day). sync_logs cap 500.000 row (high) / 400.000 (low); sync_sessions cap 10.000 / 9.000. Eviction oldest-first via id ASC LIMIT N (autoincrement = proxy waktu, hemat index). Trigger: post-write async dari runner setelah rows_failed naik + time.Ticker 1 jam di internal/maint/retention.go sebagai safety net. **PRAGMA incremental_vacuum(N)** dipanggil setelah setiap eviction batch — tanpa ini file tidak shrink dan retensi gagal mencapai tujuannya (auto_vacuum=INCREMENTAL sudah di-set di 001_init.sql per slice migrations). CASCADE: session ter-evict ikut menghapus sync_logs milik session tsb (termasuk profile_snapshot_json-nya). **Export log CSV wajib disediakan** sebelum eviction manual: per-session di Sync Session detail + bulk di Settings/Health page; tombol manual 'Bersihkan log lama' **di-block** sampai user klik export atau eksplisit confirm. Tidak ada export otomatis. UI Settings/Health page menampilkan counter (sync_logs count, sync_sessions count) dan ukuran DB (page_count × page_size) sebagai transparansi pengganti kontrol konfigurasi. Tombol 'Bersihkan log lama' (manual eviction trigger). Bulk CSV export semua session. Test boundary: 499.999/500.001 row + post-vacuum page_count reduction + CSV round-trip (UTF-8 BOM untuk Excel Windows).

title: Per-row error → ToFriendly + sync_logs

title: Cooperative Cancel (chunk-boundary)
description: POST /api/sessions/{id}/cancel idempotent → trigger context.Cancel() di runner. **Cooperative cancel di chunk boundary** per ADR-0003: chunk yang sudah BEGIN selalu commit penuh. Cancel hanya mencegah fetch chunk berikutnya, bukan abort transaksi yang sedang ter-execute. **Tidak ada tx.Rollback() path** di runner V1; chunk in-flight selesai normal (commit atau row-level error log), runner exit loop saat ctx.Err() != nil sebelum SELECT chunk berikutnya. Latency Cancel = sisa durasi chunk in-flight (~ratusan ms–detik). Status final = 'cancelled' (beda semantik dari 'interrupted' = system event connection drop / app crash, dan 'failed' = hard error). **Tidak ada rollback**: baris yang sudah ter-commit di Destination tetap ada (Source-wins UPSERT + chunk autocommit). UI: tombol Cancel mid-sync, spinner 'Membatalkan…' antara klik dan SSE cancelled event, badge netral + pesan '{processed} baris sudah masuk Destination, hapus manual jika perlu'.

title: Whole-table chunked Source-wins UPSERT
description: internal/sync/upsert.go: **Whole-table mode** — SELECT * dari Source untuk seluruh tabel di Selection Set (closed under FK via Closure Advisor), upsert ke Destination dalam chunked batch **500–1000 baris**. title: Preflight (schema drift detection both sides)
description: internal/sync/preflight.go: hybrid pre-flight struktural + runtime type, **berlaku Source + Destination**. Saat user klik Start, re-introspect kedua DB dan diff terhadap snapshot kolom di mapping_profiles.selection_json (per tabel: {name, is_pk, is_paired, side}, tanpa tipe). **Blocking Destination**: paired column missing, PK column missing/berubah, table missing, kolom baru NOT NULL tanpa DEFAULT, kolom dengan opsi 'Default DB' kehilangan DEFAULT-nya. **Blocking Source**: paired Source column missing (rename/drop) — pesan 'Kolom Source {tabel}.{kolom} tidak ditemukan. Mungkin telah di-rename atau dihapus. Buka Mapping Profile dan pilih ulang sumber kolom.', Source table missing. **Auto-handled Destination**: kolom baru nullable, kolom baru dengan DEFAULT, type widened. **Auto-handled Source**: kolom baru tidak referenced di Pairing → skip. Type narrowed (VARCHAR(100)→20, INT→SMALLINT) **tidak** ditangkap pre-flight V1 — runtime per-baris via 1406/1264/1366. **Tidak ada heuristik rename detection** — user explicit pilih ulang di Builder. title: Credential mode wizard + AES-GCM key provider
description: internal/crypto/ KeyProvider interface dengan dua impl: (a) OS keystore via go-keyring, (b) passphrase user + Argon2id KDF. Mode dipilih di dedicated route /onboarding/keamanan (bukan modal), disimpan di app_settings.key_mode (os_keystore | passphrase). Wizard muncul lazy saat user pertama klik 'Tambah Koneksi' — redirect ke route wizard kalau key_mode belum di-set, kembali ke form connection setelah selesai. Copy awam: 'Komputer ini hanya saya pakai sendiri' → keystore, 'Saya bawa di USB / komputer berganti-ganti' → passphrase. Detail teknis di collapsible. **Passphrase: minimum 5 karakter, tanpa wajib digit/mixedcase (V1 simplification).** Mode passphrase mewajibkan checkbox 'Saya sudah simpan passphrase di tempat aman, lupa = data hilang permanen' sebelum Lanjut aktif. **Unlock cadence: sekali per app launch** — passphrase di-prompt saat first credential read, di-decrypt ke in-memory cache, valid until process exit. Salt + KDF params di app_settings, ciphertext+nonce di connections.password_ciphertext. Probe keystore gagal di Linux tanpa keyring → fallback dialog ke passphrase. Re-key flow di Settings/Keamanan: satu transaksi (decrypt-old → encrypt-new → update key_mode), rollback atomic. Lupa passphrase = 'Reset semua koneksi' destructive button **hanya di Unlock dialog setelah failure** (bukan di Settings). Unlock salah 3x → rate-limit lock 60 detik. Lihat ADR-0024.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/crypto/provider.go: KeyProvider interface (Encrypt, Decrypt, Rekey)
internal/crypto/keystore.go: go-keyring impl
internal/crypto/passphrase.go: Argon2id KDF + AES-GCM
app_settings table dengan kolom key_mode, kdf_salt, kdf_params_json
/onboarding/keamanan route dengan dua card pilihan + collapsible detail teknis
Passphrase validator: ≥5 char (no other rules)
Checkbox 'saya simpan passphrase' wajib di-tick sebelum Lanjut aktif (mode passphrase)
Lazy redirect: klik 'Tambah Koneksi' di state key_mode=null → redirect ke /onboarding/keamanan
In-memory key cache: decrypt sekali per process, valid until exit
Unlock dialog muncul saat first credential read di mode passphrase
Wrong passphrase 3x → 60-detik rate limit, tombol disabled
'Reset semua koneksi' button **hanya** muncul di Unlock dialog (tidak di Settings)
Re-key flow di Settings/Keamanan dengan transaksi atomic
Probe keystore Linux fail → fallback ke passphrase
Test: encrypt+decrypt round-trip kedua mode
Test: re-key dari keystore ke passphrase dan sebaliknya
Test: passphrase salah → 3x rate limit

title: Single-instance lock per data directory
description: File magicsync.lock advisory file lock via github.com/gofrs/flock di folder yang sama dengan magicsync.db. Server tulis URL ke lock file saat startup. Instance kedua di folder sama → baca URL dari lock file, pkg/browser.OpenURL(url), exit 0 (user dapat tab baru, bukan error). Folder berbeda = lock berbeda = independen (pakai mode passphrase + DB terpisah, sah jalankan dua instance simultan). Lihat ADR-0022.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/lock/instance.go: acquire flock di {dataDir}/magicsync.lock
Server tulis URL aktif (http://127.0.0.1:PORT) ke lock file content
Instance kedua: lock acquire fail → baca URL dari file → OpenURL → exit 0
Folder berbeda → independent lock → boleh paralel
Lock dilepas saat process exit (defer)
Stale lock (process mati tanpa cleanup) → flock auto-release oleh OS
Test: spawn 2 process di folder sama, kedua exit 0 dan tab terbuka ke URL pertama
Test: 2 process di folder berbeda → keduanya jalan independen

title: SQLite migrations + self-heal
description: Plain numbered SQL files di internal/db/migrations/ (001_init.sql dst), embedded via go:embed. Tabel _migrations(version, applied_at) track applied. Bootstrap loop: list files, untuk version > MAX(_migrations.version), eksekusi dalam transaction, insert version row. PRAGMA integrity_check di startup; gagal → rename .bak (timestamped) + recreate fresh DB (Quarantine & Rebuild). 001_init.sql wajib SET PRAGMA auto_vacuum=INCREMENTAL (tidak bisa retroaktif). No down migrations V1 — rollback = .bak rebuild. No third-party lib (golang-migrate dll); ~30 baris hand-rolled.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/db/migrations/001_init.sql berisi 4 tabel PRD §6 + _migrations + auto_vacuum=INCREMENTAL
internal/db/bootstrap.go apply migrations dalam transaction, idempotent
internal/db/heal.go: integrity_check fail → rename .bak.YYYYMMDDHHMMSS + rebuild
Migration failure di tengah → transaction rollback, exit dengan pesan ramah, file asli tidak rusak
Test: migrate idempoten (run 2x = no-op)
Test: heal dengan file corrupt (truncate ke 100 byte) → quarantined + rebuild
Test: missing DB file → auto-create + apply semua migration
File ≤100 baris masing-masing

title: Bootstrap binary + embedded UI shell
description: Vertical slice fondasi: cmd/magicsync/main.go entrypoint, ephemeral 127.0.0.1 port via net.Listen tcp :0, pkg/browser.OpenURL auto-buka tab, fallback print URL ke stderr saat headless. go:embed web/out (placeholder Hello page). Bind 127.0.0.1 only (local-first). SQLite path resolution same-dir-as-binary via os.Executable + filepath.EvalSymlinks (ADR-0017). Read-only folder fail dengan pesan ramah stderr. Demoable: ./magicsync di folder kosong → browser terbuka ke halaman placeholder, log URL di stderr.
acceptance_criteria:
cmd/magicsync/main.go ≤100 baris
Binary listen di 127.0.0.1 ephemeral port (bukan 0.0.0.0)
URL ter-resolve via Listener.Addr() lalu di-pass ke pkg/browser.OpenURL
Fallback stderr saat OpenURL fail (no DISPLAY)
SQLite path = same-dir-as-binary, bukan CWD/APPDATA/XDG
Symlink di-resolve via filepath.EvalSymlinks
Read-only folder → friendly stderr error, exit non-zero
go:embed web/out terlayani di /
Smoke test: drop binary di folder kosong, jalankan, browser terbuka

title: T1#21 — Link prefetch=false di heavy routes + heuristic docs
description:
# T1#21 — `<Link prefetch={false}>` di heavy routes + heuristic docs

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q56 + T1 Amendment #21.

## Konteks

Default auto-prefetch (Next.js App Router). Opt-out untuk session detail (Q38 log+drift) dan profile detail/builder (Q40 schema tree).

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "next.js" → `query-docs` "Next.js 16 App Router Link prefetch static export behavior".
   - Validasi: behavior `prefetch={false}` di static export sama dengan dynamic.
2. Identifikasi semua `<Link href="/sessions/[id]">` + `<Link href="/profiles/[id]">` + `<Link href="/profiles/[id]/builder">`:
   - `graphify query "Link href sessions"` + serupa untuk profiles.
   - Lokasi prediksi: `app/sessions/_components/*`, `app/profiles/_components/*`, `components/Sidebar*`.
3. Tambah `prefetch={false}` di semua link yang masuk ke route detail tersebut.
4. **Tidak** opt-out di list page entry (`/sessions`, `/profiles`) atau settings.
5. Update `web/WEB_RULES.md` section baru "Route prefetch" (setelah "State management"):
   - Default auto-prefetch.
   - Opt-out untuk route dengan static payload >50KB atau revalidate-on-mount.
   - Daftar route yang opt-out di V1: session detail, profile detail, profile builder.
   - **Tidak ada** custom hover-prefetch (alasannya: keyboard a11y Q50).
6. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- Grep `<Link href="/sessions/` di FE → semua match punya `prefetch={false}`.
- Grep `<Link href="/profiles/` di FE → semua match ke detail/builder punya `prefetch={false}` (list link OK default).
- WEB_RULES.md section "Route prefetch" eksis.

## Tooling

- context7: Next.js Link prefetch.
- graphify: search Link usage.

## Dependency

Tidak ada blocker. Setelah ada Link consumer (bead UI scaffolding).
acceptance_criteria: Grep Link href sessions/ → semua ada prefetch=false; profiles detail/builder ada prefetch=false; WEB_RULES.md Route prefetch section eksis.

title: T1#15 — axe-core dev + keyboard nav docs + kontras audit
description:
# T1#15 — `@axe-core/react` dev + keyboard nav coverage + kontras audit

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q50 + T1 Amendment #15.

## Konteks

Target WCAG AA. Axe core dev-only auto-audit. Keyboard nav manual coverage untuk 4 komponen kritis. Kontras audit dual mode.

## Langkah

1. **context7 wajib**:
   - `mcp__context7__resolve-library-id` untuk "axe-core" → `query-docs` "@axe-core/react integration with Next.js 16 development mode only".
2. Install: `cd web && bun add -D @axe-core/react react-dom`.
3. File `web/src/lib/a11y.ts` (≤30 baris):
   - Conditional import: `if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') { import('@axe-core/react').then((axe) => axe.default(React, ReactDOM, 1000)) }`.
   - Pattern dari context7 docs.
4. Wire di `app/layout.tsx` — call setup di top-level `useEffect` atau di `instrumentation.ts` (Next.js 16).
5. **Keyboard nav checklist** (manual test, dokumen `web/docs/A11Y_KEYBOARD.md` — buat baru):
   - **Q40 schema picker two-pane**:
     - Tab masuk pane kiri (table list) → fokus row pertama.
     - Arrow up/down navigate row.
     - Enter → buka detail di pane kanan, fokus berpindah ke detail.
     - Tab di pane kanan navigate field.
     - Shift+Tab balik ke pane kiri.
   - **Q38 log viewer**:
     - Tab masuk list log entries.
     - Space toggle accordion (group-by mariadb_code).
     - Arrow up/down navigate.
   - **Q42 sidebar**:
     - Tab masuk → fokus link pertama.
     - Enter open, Esc close (kalau collapse).
     - Arrow navigate antar link.
   - **Q48 cmdk**:
     - Cmd+K buka.
     - Esc tutup.
     - Arrow navigate.
     - Enter select.
   - File ini = template, agent UI akan isi result setelah implementasi.
6. **Kontras audit** (dokumen `web/docs/A11Y_CONTRAST.md` — buat baru):
   - Tabel: token name, light hex, dark hex, ratio (text), ratio (UI), pass AA?.
   - Hitung pakai WebAIM contrast tool (manual) atau scripting (optional bead V2).
   - Minimum: text 4.5:1, UI 3:1.
7. Update `web/WEB_RULES.md` section "A11y MUST" → tambah:
   - `@axe-core/react` dev audit aktif.
   - Reference ke `A11Y_KEYBOARD.md` + `A11Y_CONTRAST.md`.
8. `graphify update .`.

## Acceptance

- `bun run dev` → console log axe violations (kalau ada).
- `web/docs/A11Y_KEYBOARD.md` eksis dengan 4 checklist (template kosong OK di issue ini, isi result di issue downstream).
- `web/docs/A11Y_CONTRAST.md` eksis dengan tabel (boleh kosong row, struktur kolom benar).
- `web/WEB_RULES.md` section A11y di-update.
- **No CI gate** (per Q50).

## Tooling

- context7: @axe-core/react.

## Dependency

Best bareng T1#12 (themes — kontras butuh dual palette).
acceptance_criteria: bun run dev console log axe violations; A11Y_KEYBOARD.md + A11Y_CONTRAST.md eksis (boleh kosong row); WEB_RULES.md A11y section updated; no CI gate.

title: T1#8 — web/WEB_RULES.md viewport policy section
description:
# T1#8 — Tambah viewport policy section ke `web/WEB_RULES.md`

## Referensi keputusan

`plan/DECISIONS-Q1-Q60.md` → Q43 + T1 Amendment #8.

## Konteks

Q43 lock: adaptive viewport (desktop full, tablet collapse, phone gate). `web/WEB_RULES.md` saat ini punya satu kalimat tentang responsive di section "A11y MUST" (`Mapping Builder boleh horizontal scroll di <1024px`) yang tidak menjelaskan kebijakan phone-gate.

## Langkah

1. Baca section "A11y MUST" + "Struktur folder" `web/WEB_RULES.md`.
2. Tambah section baru "Viewport policy" SETELAH section "A11y MUST", isi (prose Indonesian):
   - Definisi 3 breakpoint: phone <768px, tablet 768-1024px, desktop ≥1024px.
   - Aturan phone: page gate full-screen pesan "Magic MariaDB Sync membutuhkan layar lebih lebar. Gunakan tablet atau desktop." Komponen: `<ViewportGate>` di root `app/layout.tsx`, menggunakan media query CSS-only (Tailwind `lg:hidden` reverse pattern + JS untuk redirect-prevention).
   - Aturan tablet: sidebar (Q42) → hamburger menu (shadcn `Sheet`). Two-pane Q40 → drill-down (master list visible, detail = new screen + back button).
   - Aturan desktop: full layout.
   - Catatan: bukan mobile-first. App = desktop-first tool.
3. Tambah baris di "Domain ↔ Komponen mapping" untuk komponen baru:
   - `ViewportGate` di `components/ViewportGate.tsx`.
   - `SidebarSheet` di `components/SidebarSheet.tsx`.
4. Tidak ada implementasi kode di issue ini — hanya dokumentasi. Implementasi: bead frontend scaffolding terpisah (lihat T1#10-T1#21).

## Acceptance

- Section "Viewport policy" eksis di `web/WEB_RULES.md`.
- 3 breakpoint dijelaskan dengan aturan.
- `<ViewportGate>` + `<SidebarSheet>` tercantum di tabel mapping.

## Tooling

- Tidak butuh context7.
- Tidak butuh graphify (dokumen markdown).
acceptance_criteria: Section Viewport policy eksis di web/WEB_RULES.md; 3 breakpoint dijelaskan; ViewportGate + SidebarSheet tercantum di tabel mapping.
